name: Swarup
bio: I'm a Junior QA Engineer and fresh MCA graduate (2025) with real internship experience at Doveriye, where I was the sole technical contributor building a Python-based AI Call RAG System — and also responsible for writing manual test cases and documenting production bugs on the same product. My portfolio covers Selenium + Pytest automation, systematic manual QA on a MERN stack app (29 test cases, 4 critical bugs including a JWT session vulnerability), REST API testing, and WCAG 2.1 accessibility auditing — all designed to show how I approach quality in real-world engineering contexts.
